news.t: Top 3 Leveraged Energy ETFs for the Ukraine-Russia Crisis

holdings.infoBox: OILU is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Chevron stock at 15.36%, Exxon Mobil at 14.46%, ConocoPhillips at 6.51%, SLB N.V. at 6.36%, and Occidental Petroleum at 4.85%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Oil & Gas Exp. & Prod. 3x Leveraged ETN (OILU) is an exchange-traded note that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund provides 3x daily leveraged exposure to a liquidity-weighted index of US firms involved in oil and gas exploration and production. OILU was launched on Nov 12, 2021 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
infoTable: Solactive MicroSectors Oil & Gas Exploration & Production Index

data.text: Top Performing Leveraged/Inverse ETFs Last Week These were last week's top performing leveraged and inverse ETFs. Note that because of leverage, these kinds of funds can move quickly.

data.title: Top 3 Leveraged Energy ETFs for the Ukraine-Russia Crisis
data.text: Russia is the third largest oil producer in the world, making up 11% of global supply, according to data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA). It is also a major natural gas supplier.
